name: Vizier Nephren
dialogue: You bested my king. I watched it from the antechamber.
He calls you 'worthy.' I call you a problem that needs ledger work.
I have served the Pharaoh longer than you have drawn breath. I will not pass on his throne to a sand-walker without a final accounting.
Show me you can balance the books.
preBattleLine: Nephren snaps her ledger shut. Light leaks from the seams.
postDefeatDialogue: Nephren bows once, ledger tucked under her arm.
"The accounts balance. You are entered as the Pharaoh's true heir."
She does not smile, but the corner of her mouth twitches — that is enough.
prereqBlockedMessage: Nephren does not rise from her ledger. "The Pharaoh has not called my name. Return when he has."
